name: Chocolate Crunch
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the base of an 18cm (7in) loose-bottomed deep flan tin or round cake tin with non-stick baking parchment.
2. Break the chocolate into small pieces. Place the plain or milk chocolate in one bowl and the white chocolate in another.
3. Add 2 ounces of butter to each bowl.
4. Stand bowls over pans of hot water, leaving until the chocolate and butter have melted, stirring occasionally.
5. Remove from heat and place bowls on a work surface.
6. Stir half the cream, nuts, dates, and coarsely crushed biscuits into each mixture.
7. Spoon the darker mixture into the tin and spread level with the back of a spoon, pushing the mixture down into the corners.
8. Top with the white mixture.
9. Cover with foil or cling film and chill until set.
10. Remove from the tin and serve cut into slices.
